_comment: Custom chat shortcuts: map a short command to a longer prompt. When you type a message that is EXACTLY one of these keys (case-insensitive), Jarvis expands it to the value before answering. Edit freely — it's read fresh on every message. Keys are matched whole, so 'brief' expands but 'brief me on X' does not.
brief: Brief me — give me my morning briefing.
briefing: Brief me — give me my morning briefing.
goals: List my goals and how I'm tracking toward them.
tasks: List my open tasks, most important first.
screen: Look at my screen and tell me what's on it.
drafts: List my drafted overnight runs and their status.
recap: What did we talk about last time?
weekly review: Give me my weekly review of the last 7 days.
cost: What's my Claude API cost this week, by feature?
